title: Start Your Tour
description: Click here to begin a quick walkthrough of the app features and functionalities.

title: Your Concerned Section
description: Engaging area for you to keep focus on...!

title: Select a Torrent File
description: Use this button to select a .torrent file from your device.

title: Paste Magnet Link
description: Alternatively, paste a magnet link here instead of .torrent file.

title: Upload and Start
description: Click this button to upload your file or magnet link and initiate the download process.

title: Show Progress Button
description: Click this button to check the progress of your torrent processing.

title: Warning Message
description: Please avoid frequently clicking the 'Show Progress' button to prevent potential issues.

title: Re-Upload/Clear Cache
description: Click this button to clear cache or re-upload files if needed.

title: File List
description: This table shows the list of files being processed, including details like progress and download status.
